Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Strike Costs
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'s Motion To Strike Costs is Off calendar. On July 30, 2014, Defendant filed a Notice of Satisfaction of costs indicating that Plaintiff paid the full amount of Defendant's cost claim. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/eg
